mapper.sql: id, student_id, learning_plan_id, student_tag, followup_tag_id, enroll_date, last_followup_time, due_date, followup_interval_days, status, followup_user_id, followup_time, followup_content, followup_video_object_key, followup_video_file_name, remark, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert ignore into student_followup_record (student_id, learning_plan_id, student_tag, followup_tag_id, enroll_date, last_followup_time, due_date, followup_interval_days, status, remark, created_at, updated_at) values (#{studentId}, #{learningPlanId}, #{studentTag}, #{followupTagId}, #{enrollDate}, #{lastFollowupTime}, #{dueDate}, #{followupIntervalDays}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update student_followup_record set status = 'FOLLOWED', followup_user_id = #{followupUserId}, followup_time = #{followupTime}, followup_content = #{followupContent}, followup_video_object_key = #{followupVideoObjectKey}, followup_video_file_name = #{followupVideoFileName}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id} and status = 'NEED_FOLLOWUP'
mapper.select: select count(1) as total_count, coalesce(sum(case when status = 'NEED_FOLLOWUP' and due_date <= #{todayStart} then 1 else 0 end), 0) as today_need_followup_count, coalesce(sum(case when status = 'FOLLOWED' and followup_time >= #{todayStart} and followup_time < #{tomorrowStart} then 1 else 0 end), 0) as today_followed_count, coalesce(sum(case when status = 'FOLLOWED' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as completed_count from student_followup_record
